option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
`Skills`
---
`• Finance & Risk: Counterparty Credit Risk (CCR), SA-CCR (CRR2/CRR3), RWA optimization, Basel III/IV, EAD/PFE/CVaR computation, netting & hedging sets.` `• Quant & Numerical: Value at Risk (VaR), Monte Carlo simulation, historical simulation, Greeks (Delta, Gamma, Vega, Theta), Black-Scholes, covariance/correlation matrices, numerical methods.` `• Languages: Java 17+, SQL, Scala, Python.` `• Big Data & Cloud: Apache Spark, Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS), Data Lake, Parquet, Hadoop.` `• Frameworks & Tools: Spring Boot, Java EE, JUnit, Cucumber, Git, Kubernetes, Jira.` `• Methodologies: TDD, BDD, OOP, Agile, Hexagonal Architecture, Domain-Driven Design.`
`Experience` ---
| `Quant Developer — CCR/SA-CCR` | | `SGCIB` | `Puteaux` | `Dec 2021 – Present` | | :---- | ----- | :---: | ----: | ----: |
`• Designed and deployed production SA-CCR risk engines for standardized CCR computation, optimizing 900M€+ in regulatory capital (RWA) using Java, Spring Boot, Spark, and Azure — covering CRR2 implementation and CRR3 evolution.` `• Architected a high-performance equity basket pricing and risk library for derivatives valuation, correlation matrices, and path-dependent instruments.` `• Implemented implicit volatility solvers with moneyness grids and warm-start search, reducing CPU latency by 40% on critical simulations.` `• Built risk-factor aggregation engines for equity derivatives — automated notional scaling, netting-set decomposition, and exposure-at-default computation across hedging strategies.` `• Built a commodities risk calculator for market risk analytics, handling 53-tenor forward curves, basis risk, and inter-maturity netting.` `• Profiled and optimized distributed SA-CCR engines end-to-end: Spark repartitioning to eliminate data skew, Kryo serialization for compact shuffle, broadcast joins on reference data, and JVM GC tuning to cap pause-time spikes — halving full-portfolio batch runtime from 60 min to 30 min.` `• Migrated legacy quant models to Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) microservices and delivered APIs` `and dashboards for EAD, PFE, and CVaR monitoring.` `• Supported internal (IGAD) and external (ECB) audit reviews on SA-CCR platform — providing BDD test evidence, scalability stress-test results, and computation traceability for RWA validation.`
| `Software Engineer` | | `Dassault Systèmes` | `Vélizy-Villacoublay` | `02/2021 - 09/2021` | | :---- | ----- | :---: | ----: | ----: |
`• Developed REST endpoints for the 3DExperience cloud platform and integrated multi-source engineering data into dashboard services using Java, Java EE, JavaScript, JUnit, Jasmine, and SQL.`
`Education` ---
| `Master’s in Computer Science` | | `Ensimag | Phelma` | `Grenoble` | `2021` | | :---- | ----- | :---: | ----: | ----: |
`• Main courses: Algorithms, Numerical Computing, Probability and Statistics, Graph Theory, Architecture, Cybersecurity, Real-Time Systems.`
| `Bachelor of Science` | | `Phelma` | `Grenoble` | `2020` | | :---- | ----- | :---: | ----: | ----: |
`• Major in Physics and Telecommunications.`
`Projects` ---
`Market Risk Quant Platform — VaR, Greeks, Stress Testing` `• Built a cloud-native market risk platform for VaR, Greeks, stress testing, and real-time reporting using Java 21, Spring Boot, Apache Spark, and Kafka-ready ingestion.` `• Implemented Parametric VaR and Monte Carlo VaR engines with covariance-matrix calibration, Cholesky-based correlation propagation, and reproducible simulation seeds.` `• Designed a Spark ingestion pipeline that reads market data files, computes log returns, annualized volatility, and correlation matrices, then calibrates market risk inputs for portfolio analytics.` `• Structured the platform with framework-free domain logic and Hexagonal Architecture, use-case ports` `and infrastructure adapters for REST, scheduling, Spark ingestion, and conditional Kafka integration.`
`Numerical Interpreter — Deca Compiler & Trigonometry Plugin` `• Developed a Java compiler/interpreter for Deca with lexical analysis, parsing, AST construction` `and trigonometric computation based on Chebyshev polynomial approximation.`

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
`Skills`
---
`• Finance & Risk: Counterparty Credit Risk (CCR), SA-CCR (CRR2/CRR3), RWA optimization, Basel III/IV, EAD/PFE/CVaR computation, netting & hedging sets.` `• Quant & Numerical: Value at Risk (VaR), Monte Carlo simulation, historical simulation, Greeks (Delta, Gamma, Vega, Theta), Black-Scholes, covariance/correlation matrices, numerical methods.` `• Languages: Java 17+, SQL, Scala, Python.` `• Big Data & Cloud: Apache Spark, Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS), Data Lake, Parquet, Hadoop.` `• Frameworks & Tools: Spring Boot, Java EE, JUnit, Cucumber, Git, Kubernetes, Jira.` `• Methodologies: TDD, BDD, OOP, Agile, Hexagonal Architecture, Domain-Driven Design.`
`Experience` ---
| `Quant Developer — CCR/SA-CCR` | | `SGCIB` | `Puteaux` | `Dec 2021 – Present` | | :---- | ----- | :---: | ----: | ----: |
`• Designed and deployed production SA-CCR risk engines for standardized CCR computation, optimizing 900M€+ in regulatory capital (RWA) using Java, Spring Boot, Spark, and Azure — covering CRR2 implementation and CRR3 evolution.` `• Architected a high-performance equity basket pricing and risk library for derivatives valuation, correlation matrices, and path-dependent instruments.` `• Implemented implicit volatility solvers with moneyness grids and warm-start search, reducing CPU latency by 40% on critical simulations.` `• Built risk-factor aggregation engines for equity derivatives — automated notional scaling, netting-set decomposition, and exposure-at-default computation across hedging strategies.` `• Built a commodities risk calculator for market risk analytics, handling 53-tenor forward curves, basis risk, and inter-maturity netting.` `• Profiled and optimized distributed SA-CCR engines end-to-end: Spark repartitioning to eliminate data skew, Kryo serialization for compact shuffle, broadcast joins on reference data, and JVM GC tuning to cap pause-time spikes — halving full-portfolio batch runtime from 60 min to 30 min.` `• Migrated legacy quant models to Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) microservices and delivered APIs` `and dashboards for EAD, PFE, and CVaR monitoring.` `• Supported internal (IGAD) and external (ECB) audit reviews on SA-CCR platform — providing BDD test evidence, scalability stress-test results, and computation traceability for RWA validation.`
| `Software Engineer` | | `Dassault Systèmes` | `Vélizy-Villacoublay` | `Feb 2021 – Sep 2021` | | :---- | ----- | :---: | ----: | ----: |
`• Developed REST endpoints for the 3DExperience cloud platform and integrated multi-source engineering data into dashboard services using Java, Java EE, JavaScript, JUnit, Jasmine, and SQL.`
`Education` ---
| `Master’s in Computer Science` | | `Ensimag | Phelma` | `Grenoble` | `2021` | | :---- | ----- | :---: | ----: | ----: |
`• Main courses: Algorithms, Numerical Computing, Probability and Statistics, Graph Theory, Architecture, Cybersecurity, Real-Time Systems.`
| `Bachelor of Science` | | `Phelma` | `Grenoble` | `2020` | | :---- | ----- | :---: | ----: | ----: |
`• Major in Physics and Telecommunications.`
`Projects` ---
`Market Risk Quant Platform — VaR, Greeks, Stress Testing` `• Built a cloud-native market risk platform for VaR, Greeks, stress testing, and real-time reporting using Java 21, Spring Boot, Apache Spark, and Kafka-ready ingestion.` `• Implemented Parametric VaR and Monte Carlo VaR engines with covariance-matrix calibration, Cholesky-based correlation propagation, and reproducible simulation seeds.` `• Designed a Spark ingestion pipeline that reads market data files, computes log returns, annualized volatility, and correlation matrices, then calibrates market risk inputs for portfolio analytics.` `• Structured the platform with framework-free domain logic and Hexagonal Architecture, use-case ports` `and infrastructure adapters for REST, scheduling, Spark ingestion, and conditional Kafka integration.`
`Numerical Interpreter — Deca Compiler & Trigonometry Plugin` `• Developed a Java compiler/interpreter for Deca with lexical analysis, parsing, AST construction` `and trigonometric computation based on Chebyshev polynomial approximation.`

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
Kacem JEDOUI IT Quant | Market Risk Engineering
COMPÉTENCES
- Finance & Risk : Counterparty Credit Risk (CCR), SA-CCR (CRR2/CRR3), optimisation RWA, Bâle III/IV, EAD/PFE/CVaR computation, netting & hedging sets. - Quant & Numerical : Value at Risk (VaR), Monte Carlo simulation, historical simulation, Greeks (Delta, Gamma, Vega, Theta), Black-Scholes, covariance/correlation matrices, méthodes numériques. - Languages: Java 17+, SQL, Scala, Python. - Big Data & Cloud: Apache Spark, Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS), Data Lake, Parquet, Hadoop. - Frameworks & Tools: Spring Boot, Java EE, JUnit, Cucumber, Git, Kubernetes, Jira. - Methodologies: TDD, BDD, POO, Agile, Architecture Hexagonale, Domain-Driven Design.
EXPÉRIENCE
**IT Quant — CCR/SA-CCR** | SGCIB | Puteaux | Dec 2021 – Present
- Conçu et déployé des moteurs SA-CCR en production, optimisant 900M€+ de capital réglementaire (RWA) avec Java, Spring Boot, Spark et Azure — couvrant CRR2 et CRR3. - Architecturé une bibliothèque haute performance de pricing et risk pour equity baskets, valorisation de dérivés, correlation matrices et instruments path-dependent. - Implémenté des solveurs de volatilité implicite avec moneyness grids et warm-start search, réduisant la latence CPU de 40% sur les simulations critiques. - Développé des moteurs d'agrégation de risk factors pour equity derivatives — notional scaling, netting-set decomposition et exposure-at-default computation à travers les hedging strategies. - Construit un calculateur de risque commodities, gérant des forward curves à 53 ténors, le basis risk et le netting inter-maturités. - Profilé et optimisé les moteurs SA-CCR distribués end-to-end : Spark repartitioning, Kryo serialization, broadcast joins et JVM GC tuning — réduisant le batch runtime de 60 min à 30 min. - Migré les modèles quant legacy vers des microservices AKS et livré des APIs et dashboards de monitoring EAD, PFE et CVaR. - Accompagné les audits interne (IGAD) et externe (BCE) sur la plateforme SA-CCR — tests BDD, stress-tests de scalabilité et computation traceability pour la validation RWA.
**Software Engineer** | Dassault Systèmes | Vélizy-Villacoublay | Feb 2021 – Sep 2021
- Développé des REST endpoints pour la plateforme cloud 3DExperience et intégré des données d'ingénierie multi-sources dans des dashboard services avec Java, Java EE, JavaScript, JUnit, Jasmine et SQL.
FORMATION
**Diplôme d'Ingénieur** | Ensimag / Phelma | Grenoble INP | 2021
- Specialization SEOC: Numerical Computing, Probability & Statistics, Algorithms, Signal Processing.
PROJETS
[Market Risk Quant Platform](https://github.com/kacemjd/market-risk-quant) — VaR, Greeks, Stress Testing
- Développé une plateforme cloud-native de market risk pour VaR, Greeks, stress testing et real-time reporting avec Java 21, Spring Boot, Apache Spark et Kafka-ready ingestion. - Implémenté des moteurs Parametric VaR et Monte Carlo VaR avec covariance-matrix calibration, Cholesky-based correlation propagation et reproducible simulation seeds. - Conçu un Spark ingestion pipeline lisant les market data files, calculant les log returns, annualized volatility et correlation matrices, puis calibrant les market risk inputs pour le portfolio analytics. - Structuré la plateforme avec une logique métier framework-free et Architecture Hexagonale — use-case ports et infrastructure adapters interchangeables pour REST, scheduling et Spark ingestion.
Interpréteur Numérique — Compilateur Deca & Plugin Trigonométrique
- Développé un compilateur/interpréteur Java pour Deca avec lexical analysis, parsing, AST construction et trigonometric computation basé sur l'approximation polynomiale de Chebyshev.

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
Kacem JEDOUI IT Quant | Market Risk Engineering
COMPÉTENCES
- Finance & Risk : Counterparty Credit Risk (CCR), SA-CCR (CRR2/CRR3), optimisation RWA, Bâle III/IV, EAD/PFE/CVaR computation, netting & hedging sets. - Quant & Numerical : Value at Risk (VaR), Monte Carlo simulation, historical simulation, Greeks (Delta, Gamma, Vega, Theta), Black-Scholes, covariance/correlation matrices, méthodes numériques. - Languages: Java 17+, SQL, Scala, Python. - Big Data & Cloud: Apache Spark, Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS), Data Lake, Parquet, Hadoop. - Frameworks & Tools: Spring Boot, Java EE, JUnit, Cucumber, Git, Kubernetes, Jira. - Methodologies: TDD, BDD, POO, Agile, Architecture Hexagonale, Domain-Driven Design.
EXPÉRIENCE
**IT Quant — CCR/SA-CCR** | SGCIB | Puteaux | Dec 2021 – Present
- Conçu et déployé des moteurs SA-CCR en production, optimisant 900M€+ de capital réglementaire (RWA) avec Java, Spring Boot, Spark et Azure — couvrant CRR2 et CRR3. - Architecturé une bibliothèque haute performance de pricing et risk pour equity baskets, valorisation de dérivés, correlation matrices et instruments path-dependent. - Implémenté des solveurs de volatilité implicite avec moneyness grids et warm-start search, réduisant la latence CPU de 40% sur les simulations critiques. - Développé des moteurs d'agrégation de risk factors pour equity derivatives — notional scaling, netting-set decomposition et exposure-at-default computation à travers les hedging strategies. - Construit un calculateur de risque commodities, gérant des forward curves à 53 ténors, le basis risk et le netting inter-maturités. - Profilé et optimisé les moteurs SA-CCR distribués end-to-end : Spark repartitioning, Kryo serialization, broadcast joins et JVM GC tuning — réduisant le batch runtime de 60 min à 30 min. - Migré les modèles quant legacy vers des microservices AKS et livré des APIs et dashboards de monitoring EAD, PFE et CVaR. - Accompagné les audits interne (IGAD) et externe (BCE) sur la plateforme SA-CCR — tests BDD, stress-tests de scalabilité et computation traceability pour la validation RWA.
**Software Engineer** | Dassault Systèmes | Vélizy-Villacoublay | Feb 2021 – Sep 2021
- Développé des REST endpoints pour la plateforme cloud 3DExperience et intégré des données d'ingénierie multi-sources dans des dashboard services avec Java, Java EE, JavaScript, JUnit, Jasmine et SQL.
FORMATION
**Diplôme d'Ingénieur** | Ensimag / Phelma | Grenoble INP | 2021
- Spécialisation SEOC : Numerical Computing, Probability & Statistics, Algorithms, Signal Processing.
PROJETS
[Market Risk Quant Platform](https://github.com/kacemjd/market-risk-quant) — VaR, Greeks, Stress Testing
- Développé une plateforme cloud-native de market risk pour VaR, Greeks, stress testing et real-time reporting avec Java 21, Spring Boot, Apache Spark et Kafka-ready ingestion. - Implémenté des moteurs Parametric VaR et Monte Carlo VaR avec covariance-matrix calibration, Cholesky-based correlation propagation et reproducible simulation seeds. - Conçu un Spark ingestion pipeline lisant les market data files, calculant les log returns, annualized volatility et correlation matrices, puis calibrant les market risk inputs pour le portfolio analytics. - Structuré la plateforme avec une logique métier framework-free et Architecture Hexagonale — use-case ports et infrastructure adapters interchangeables pour REST, scheduling et Spark ingestion.
Interpréteur Numérique — Compilateur Deca & Plugin Trigonométrique
- Développé un compilateur/interpréteur Java pour Deca avec lexical analysis, parsing, AST construction et trigonometric computation basé sur l'approximation polynomiale de Chebyshev.
